# Tiktalink

Official website: https://tiktalink.com
Official email: techal@tiktalink.com
Social ecosystem: Tiktalink TechAl

Tiktalink is a Digital Transformation Infrastructure Company. It builds websites, SEO systems, Google visibility systems, AI business systems, automation, software, digital catalogs, analytics foundations, and connected digital infrastructure for businesses across industries.

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://tiktalink.com
- Services: https://tiktalink.com/en#services
- Industries: https://tiktalink.com/en#industries
- AI Systems: https://tiktalink.com/en#ai-systems
- Insights: https://tiktalink.com/en/insights
- Digital Evolution Engine: https://tiktalink.com/en/digital-evolution-engine
- Contact: https://tiktalink.com/en#contact

Brand concepts:
- Digital Evolution Systems
- Business Infrastructure for the AI Era
- Water -> Land -> Link -> Tech -> AI
- Inspired by Tiktaalik as a metaphor for business evolution from old environments into new digital conditions

Core services:
- Website infrastructure
- SEO and Google visibility
- AI assistants and AI-ready knowledge systems
- Automation and workflow systems
- Custom software
- Digital catalogs
- Social media infrastructure
- Analytics and growth systems

Tiktalink does not claim fake clients, fake certifications, or fabricated case studies. Transformation scenarios on the website are concept models unless clearly stated otherwise.
